note: AAT conformance validator aligned with IETF draft-sharif-agent-audit-trail-00 (alignment, not certified). RFC 8785 JCS + SHA-256 chain. sha256_prev_record must be 64 lowercase hex chars or empty (first record). ECDSA presence is optional per draft.

vectors.name: fully_conformant_chained_ecdsa
vectors.description: Fully conformant chained record with all required fields and optional ECDSA present. sha256_prev_record is a valid 64-char hex. Known: chain_position=chained when sha256_prev_record non-empty.

output_payload.alignment_note: Aligned with IETF draft-sharif-agent-audit-trail-00 (I-D expires Sept 2026). Not a certified standard conformance check — no conformance authority exists for this draft.
output_payload.regulatory_basis: IETF draft-sharif-agent-audit-trail-00; RFC 8785 (JSON Canonicalisation Scheme); EU AI Act (Reg. 2024/1689) Art 12(2)

vectors.name: conformant_first_record_no_ecdsa
vectors.description: Conformant first record (sha256_prev_record empty = first in chain). ECDSA absent triggers a warning. Known: CHAIN_FIRST_RECORD flag set when sha256_prev_record is empty.

validation_warnings: ecdsa_signature absent — AAT recommends optional ECDSA signature
output_payload.alignment_note: Aligned with IETF draft-sharif-agent-audit-trail-00 (I-D expires Sept 2026). Not a certified standard conformance check — no conformance authority exists for this draft.
output_payload.regulatory_basis: IETF draft-sharif-agent-audit-trail-00; RFC 8785 (JSON Canonicalisation Scheme); EU AI Act (Reg. 2024/1689) Art 12(2)

vectors.name: empty_input_finite
vectors.description: Empty inputs return EMPTY_INPUT sentinel with finite zero-state. Confirms empty-input-finite gate.

output_payload.alignment_note: Aligned with IETF draft-sharif-agent-audit-trail-00 (expires Sept 2026). Not a certified standard conformance check.
output_payload.regulatory_basis: IETF draft-sharif-agent-audit-trail-00; RFC 8785 JCS; EU AI Act Art 12
